'''Alric Adannon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] of [[House Cadriaan]]. He represented his house in the annual inter-house [[Vor-cal]] safari hunt in which he once came second. Lord Adannon was a loud and arrogant man who was angered when his house [[Privy council]] disinvited him from representing Cadriaan at the Vor-cal shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|battle of Endor]]. He had broad shoulders and often wore a reptilian hide cloak that he claimed was from a [[Krayt dragon/Legends|Krayt dragon]] but was in reality from a [[Rodian Swamp Lizard]].<ref name="LOTE" />
